title: Amendment in Schedule I of NFSA, 2013 dated 29.06.2017
description: Amendment in Schedule I of NFSA, 2013 dated 29.06.2017

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 1819] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] twu 29] 2017@vk"kk<+ 8] 1939 No. 1819] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, JUNE 29, 2017/ASADHA 8, 1939 उपभोक् ता मामले, खा᳒ और सावर् जिनक िवतरण मंᮢालय (खा᳒ और सावर् जिनक िवतरण िवभाग) अिधसूचना नई िदल् ली, 29 जून, 2017 का.आ. 2041(अ).—केन्ᮤीय सरकार, राष् ᮝीय खा᳒ सु रक्षा अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 20) की अनुसूची I के उपबंधᲂ के अनुसरण मᱶ, भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग- II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ अिधसूचना संख्यां क का.आ. 3577(अ), तारीख 29 नव᭥बर, 2016 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत, भारत सरकार के उपभोक् ता मामले, खा᳒ और सावर् जिनक िवतरण मंᮢालय के खा᳒ और सावर् जिनक िवतरण िवभाग की अिधसूचना मᱶ एतद᳇ारा िन᭥निलिखत और संशोधन करती है, अथार्त् :- उक् त अिधसूचना मᱶ, “30 जून, 2017” शब् दᲂ, अंकᲂ और अक्षरᲂ के स् थान पर “30 जू न, 2018” शब् दᲂ, अंकᲂ और अक्षरᲂ को रखा जाएगा । [फा. सं. 15-8/2014-एनएफएसए] नीला᭥बुज शरण, आिथर्क सलाहकार िटप् पण: मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग- II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ का.आ. संख्यां क 3577(अ), तारीख 29 नव᭥बर, 2016, ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत िकया गया था तथा तत्प᳟ात का.आ. संख् यां क 1003(अ), तारीख 30 माचर्, 2017 ᳇ारा संशोिधत िकया गया था । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—S EC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (Department of Food and Public Distribution) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29 th June, 2017. S.O. 2041(E).—In pursuance of the provisions of Schedule I to the National Food Security Act, 2013 (20 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Department of Food and Public Distribution, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 3577(E), dated the 29 th November, 2016, namely:- In the said notification, for the words, figures and letters “the 30 th June, 2017”, the words, figures and letters “the 30 th June, 2018” shall be substituted. [F. No. 15-8/2014-NFSA] NILAMBUJ SHARAN, Economic Adviser Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 3577(E), dated the 29 th November, 2016 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 1003(E), dated 30 th March, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
